# aiRoast.app

Brutal honesty for startup founders. An AI-powered skepticism engine that teardowns pitch decks and startup ideas using structured mental models (Fermi estimation, Pre-mortems, Inversion).

## Core Teardown Process
1. **Submit Pitch**: Up to 5000 characters of startup pitch text.
2. **Calibration**: 5 high-friction questions to anchor the AI to reality.
3. **Analysis**: Teardown of unit economics, distribution, and market assumptions.
4. **Report**: Multi-page PDF teardown with a deterministic Skepticism Score.

## Resources & Frameworks
- **Investor Prep**: How to stress-test pitches, common deck mistakes, and what investors never ask aloud.
- **Post-Rejection**: Extracting signal from "No", pivot vs. persist frameworks.

## Technical Details
- **Architecture**: Next.js (App Router), i18n support.
- **Privacy**: No accounts, no emails. Pitch data is deleted post-analysis.

## Links
- [Landing Page](https://airoast.app)
- [Resources Hub](https://airoast.app/en/blog)
- [Start a Roast](https://airoast.app/en/roast)
